title: SmokePoppyJain
description: A light and umami weeknight dish featuring smoke-infused poppy seeds, a perfect accompaniment for various vegan meals.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine poppy seeds, olive oil, garlic powder, and salt. If using smoke flavoring, add it now.
Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Transfer the mixture into an oven-safe dish or shallow baking pan.
Drizzle 2 tablespoons of vegan butter over the top layer to ensure even cooking and a crispy texture.
Bake in preheated oven for about 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown on top.
Remove from heat. Let it cool slightly before serving.
